env.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
env.reason: Required by ChatOpenAI for the router and specialist agents.

env.name: OPENAI_MODEL
env.reason: Optional override for the tutor's default model used by the router and specialists.

env.name: TUTOR_LEARNER_ID
env.reason: Optional stable learner id for the progress store used during simulation.

env.name: TUTOR_THREAD_ID
env.reason: Optional LangGraph thread id when a simulation should reuse an existing checkpointed conversation.

files.reason: Optional SQLite progress database path for the learner store.
Optional SQLite checkpoint database path for LangGraph thread state.
